title: Update VM Images + Drop prior-ubuntu references
body:
Prior-Ubuntu support is being dropped everywhere.

Ref: https://github.com/containers/podman/issues/11070
     https://github.com/containers/automation_images/pull/88

Signed-off-by: Chris Evich <cevich@redhat.com>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *cevich* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please assign **mheon** after the PR has been reviewed. You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @mheon` in a comment when ready. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman-py).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/main/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
@cevich I think https://github.com/containers/podman-py/blob/6532351a4c95ceae83d1387924e2a024dbdb7eb2/.cirrus.yml#L4 needs to be `main` not `master`.
Oh, is that still there? I don't even think we use it...
...fixed, was a rebase goof on my part.
